descriptions.clarify: Turn ambiguity into a reviewable plan
descriptions.cowork: Plan, act, and verify alongside you

intro.title: Hi, welcome to CoWork
intro.subtitle: CoWork is a local-first workspace for multi-agent AI collaboration. It can read your project context, use local tools with approval, and help agents work alongside you in code, research, planning, and daily workflows.

local.title: Local tools, real context
local.desc: Agents can work with files, terminals, projects, memory, and workspace context on your machine.

team.title: Multi-agent collaboration
team.desc: Create focused assistants, delegate tasks, and keep a human-in-the-loop workflow.

memory.title: Personal identity and memory
memory.desc: Choose a SOUL.md persona and profile so every new request starts from the right collaboration style.

nickname.title: What should CoWork call you?
nickname.subtitle: This is stored locally and written into USER.md so agents can address you naturally.

interests.title: What areas are you interested in?
interests.subtitle: Pick one or more. CoWork uses this to choose better defaults and personalize your local profile.

soul.title: Choose your default SOUL
soul.subtitle: SOUL.md defines the assistant's long-term identity, communication style, and behavior boundaries. You can change it later in Global Identity & Memory.
soul.loadFailed: Failed to load built-in SOUL templates
soul.empty: No built-in SOUL templates were found.

balanced-collaborator.name: Balanced Professional Collaborator
balanced-collaborator.description: A steady default persona for mixed daily work, thoughtful discussion, and general assistance.

senior-engineering-partner.name: Senior Software Engineering Partner
senior-engineering-partner.description: A rigorous programming persona for reading code, making scoped changes, debugging, reviews, and technical decisions.

daily-life-assistant.name: Daily Life Assistant
daily-life-assistant.description: A pragmatic everyday persona for planning, reminders, decisions, messages, travel, learning, and personal organization.

emotionally-attuned-companion.name: Emotionally Attuned Companion
emotionally-attuned-companion.description: A careful emotional support persona for reflective conversation, relationship wording, and difficult moments.

research-writing-strategist.name: Research and Writing Strategist
research-writing-strategist.description: A precise persona for research synthesis, writing plans, editing, argument quality, and source-aware work.

product-strategy-operator.name: Product Strategy Operator
product-strategy-operator.description: A product and business persona for prioritization, UX tradeoffs, launch planning, and operational clarity.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.noProvider: No AI provider configured. Set up a provider in Settings first.

update.buttonTooltip: A new version is available. Click to view release notes.
update.noReleaseNotes: No release notes were provided for this version.
update.restartDescription: A new version ({{version}}) has been downloaded. Would you like to restart now to apply the update, or restart later?
